articles.title: 伊朗战争最新动态：胡塞参战后美国海军陆战队抵达中东
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Marines Arrive in Middle East, as Houthis Enter War
articles.summary: 伊朗战事目前迎来最新进展，胡塞武装已参战，美国海军陆战队抵达中东。一名美国官员披露，伊朗此前袭击沙特一处军事基地，造成约24名美军受伤，这是本轮战事爆发以来美国防线遭遇的最严重突破之一。
articles.summary_original: A U.S. official said that earlier an Iranian strike at a military base in Saudi Arabia injured around two dozen U.S. troops, one of the most serious breaches of American defenses since the war began.

articles.title: 五角大楼正策划“为期数周地面行动”，“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰和3500名士兵抵达中东战区 - 华尔街见闻
articles.summary: 据华尔街见闻援引谷歌新闻消息，美国五角大楼正在策划在中东开展为期数周的地面行动，目前美军“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰已搭载3500名士兵抵达中东战区，美军这一动向引发外界对中东地区局势走向的高度关注。

articles.title: 树立和践行正确政绩观|安徽：以学习教育提升法律监督动能 - spp.gov.cn
articles.summary: 当前各地扎实开展树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育，安徽将学习教育成效转化为法律监督工作动能。习近平总书记曾对政绩观相关问题作出重要论述，该主题学习教育工作得到最高检官网、人民日报、光明网等多家平台与媒体关注报道。

articles.title: 倪岳峰主持召开河北省委理论学习中心组学习会 - hebcdi.gov.cn
articles.summary: 倪岳峰主持召开河北省委理论学习中心组学习会。多家主流媒体聚焦雄安新区这一“未来之城”的发展，回顾习近平总书记对雄安建设的指引，阐释总书记一以贯之的发展理念，关注雄安一体推进高质量建设与高效能治理，展望雄安的发展前景。

articles.title: 四旬斋过半 魁北克小岛以假面吉格舞庆祝
articles.title_original: Halfway Through Lent, a Small Quebec Island Celebrates With Masks and Jigs
articles.summary: 正值四旬斋过半时节，加拿大魁北克一座小岛举办特色庆祝活动，参与者戴面具、跳吉格舞。如今岛上极少有居民遵守四旬斋斋戒要求，但当地人仍保留着这一曾被视为对抗罗马天主教会权威的传统。
articles.summary_original: Few islanders still observe Lent, but they cling to a tradition once seen as defying the all-powerful Roman Catholic Church.

articles.title: 以军称两天内打击伊朗和黎巴嫩境内超250个目标 - news.cn
articles.summary: 以色列军方称，其在两天内对伊朗、黎巴嫩境内目标开展打击行动，共打击超250个目标，打击对象包括伊朗船舶工业组织总部、核设施、武器基地、海军导弹与水雷生产设施等关键目标。此前特朗普发出的48小时最后通牒已到期，霍尔木兹局势走到关键时刻。

articles.title: 特朗普凭直觉发动战争 此举并未奏效
articles.title_original: Trump is waging war based on instinct and it isn't working
articles.summary: 伊朗冲突已持续一个月，相关分析指出，特朗普在此次冲突的决策过程中始终采取依赖自身直觉的行事方式，从目前的局势进展来看，这套依赖直觉的决策方式并未发挥预期效用，没能取得理想成果。
articles.summary_original: One month into the conflict in Iran, Trump's gut-instinct approach is not proving effective.

articles.title: 监狱通话记录引发前阿伯克龙比老板受审资格质疑
articles.title_original: Prison phone call recordings raise questions over ex-Abercrombie boss' fitness for trial
articles.summary: 监狱通话记录引发外界对前阿伯克龙比品牌老板迈克·杰弗里斯受审资格的质疑。迈克·杰弗里斯的代理律师主张，当事人目前已患上痴呆症以及晚发性阿尔茨海默病，其是否具备正常受审的身心条件存疑。
articles.summary_original: Mike Jeffries' lawyers argue that he is suffering with dementia and late onset of Alzheimer's disease.

articles.title: 巴基斯坦称伊朗已同意再放行20艘巴船只通过霍尔木兹海峡 - 央广网
articles.summary: 巴基斯坦对外公布消息称，伊朗已同意再放行20艘巴基斯坦船只通过霍尔木兹海峡，该消息由央广网发布，目前该事件的完整报道已上传至Google新闻平台，感兴趣的公众可前往该平台查看完整内容。

articles.title: 一只蚂蚁售价220美元：野生动物贩运新前沿
articles.title_original: One ant for $220: the new frontier of wildlife trafficking
articles.summary: 当前收集蚂蚁的热潮兴起，单只蚂蚁售价可达220美元，走私者趁机涌入这一领域牟利，让原本对此缺乏准备的肯尼亚始料未及，蚂蚁非法交易也成为野生动物贩运领域涌现的新方向。
articles.summary_original: The craze for collecting ants takes Kenya by surprise as smugglers zone in to make a profit.

articles.title: 电视明星深度伪造色情丑闻震动德国
articles.title_original: How deepfake porn scandal surrounding TV star rocked Germany
articles.summary: 德国曝出一起震动全国的深度伪造色情丑闻，电视明星科琳·费尔南德斯指控其前夫在网络上散布涉她的深度伪造色情图片，遭到指控的前夫已明确否认该项指控，该事件引发德国社会震动。
articles.summary_original: Collien Fernandes has accused her ex-husband of spreading images of her online, but he has categorically denied it.

articles.title: 新德里街边摊位凸显印度能源危机代价
articles.title_original: New Delhi Street Stalls Show the Cost of India’s Energy Crunch
articles.summary: 数十年来，印度新德里主巴士总站外一批搭着临时遮阳棚的小吃摊，一直向往来疲惫的旅客售卖煎薄饼、热炖菜与热茶等餐食。这些街边小摊位的处境，正是印度此次能源危机给普通民生带来冲击与代价的直观体现。
articles.summary_original: Outside New Delhi’s main bus terminus, a cluster of food stalls set up under makeshift canopies has been selling pan-fried flatbreads, comforting stews and hot tea to weary travelers for decades.

articles.title: 西藏庆祝百万农奴解放六十七周年 - 中国经济网
articles.summary: 西藏迎来百万农奴解放六十七周年，当地隆重举办纪念庆祝活动，多家主流媒体围绕该纪念日推出相关报道，各媒体从民族服饰变迁、农奴后代成长等不同角度切入，展现西藏解放数十年来发生的翻天覆地的变化。

articles.title: Bluesky推出AI驱动的自定义信息流构建应用Attie
articles.title_original: Bluesky leans into AI with Attie, an app for building custom feeds
articles.summary: 开放社交领域的Bluesky推出全新人工智能应用Attie，该应用依托Bluesky的开放社交网络协议ATProto，借助AI技术帮助用户打造符合个人需求的自定义信息流，是Bluesky布局人工智能领域的最新动作。
articles.summary_original: Bluesky’s new app Attie uses AI to help people build custom feeds the open social networking protocol atproto.

articles.title: 全美多地爆发“无王”抗议 反对唐纳德·特朗普
articles.title_original: No Kings protests across the US rally against Donald Trump
articles.summary: 美国多地爆发反对唐纳德·特朗普的“无王”抗议集会活动，其中一场核心旗舰抗议活动在明尼苏达州举办，知名歌手布鲁斯·斯普林斯汀到场，面向参与抗议集会的民众登台表演。
articles.summary_original: One of the flagship No Kings rallies happened in Minnesota, where singer Bruce Springsteen preformed to crowds.

articles.title: 战争当前，迪拜知名赛马赛事仍照常举办
articles.title_original: In Dubai, a famed horse race goes on, despite the war.
articles.summary: 尽管目前地区受冲突战事影响局势不稳，迪拜仍照常举办享誉全球的知名赛马赛事。这项顶级年度文旅体育活动吸引全球马术爱好者参与，主办方希望借此维持迪拜国际名片影响力，赛事举办也因战乱背景引发不少讨论。

articles.title: 多家广播机构称三名黎巴嫩记者在以色列袭击中身亡
articles.title_original: Three Lebanese journalists killed in Israeli strike, say broadcasters
articles.summary: 多家广播机构对外发布消息称，三名黎巴嫩记者在以色列发动的袭击中身亡。以色列军方已证实，此次袭击中被打死的人员包含隶属于真主党附属阿尔马纳尔电视台的记者阿里·肖伊布。
articles.summary_original: The Israeli military confirms it killed Ali Shoeib from the Hezbollah-affiliated Al Manar TV.

articles.title: 河南加快建设全国统一大市场循环枢纽 - 人民日报
articles.summary: 河南正加快建设全国统一大市场循环枢纽，这一主题相关报道由人民日报推出，完整报道内容现已上线Google新闻平台，感兴趣的读者可前往该平台查看报道全文，了解该项建设工作的相关详细内容。

articles.title: 扎克伯格发讯马斯克 愿为狗狗币提供帮助
articles.title_original: Mark Zuckerberg texted Elon Musk to offer help with DOGE
articles.summary: 此前扎克伯格与马斯克关系紧张，马斯克甚至曾向扎克伯格发出笼斗挑战。最新消息显示，扎克伯格已向马斯克发去讯息，愿为狗狗币提供帮助，二人关系在第二届特朗普政府执政初期似乎已经回暖。
articles.summary_original: While the relationship was once thorny enough that Musk challenged Zuckerberg to a cagefight, things seem to have warmed up by the early days of the second Trump administration.

articles.title: 斯坦福研究指出向AI聊天机器人寻求个人建议存在风险
articles.title_original: Stanford study outlines dangers of asking AI chatbots for personal advice
articles.summary: 针对AI讨好迎合用户的倾向，业内已展开诸多讨论，近日斯坦福大学计算机科学家开展了一项新研究，尝试衡量这种倾向可能造成的危害，梳理出向AI聊天机器人寻求个人建议存在的相关风险。
articles.summary_original: While there’s been plenty of debate about AI sycophancy, a new study by Stanford computer scientists attempts to measure how harmful that tendency might be.

articles.title: 空袭重创德黑兰一所大学及多个居民区
articles.title_original: Airstrikes batter a university and residential zones in Tehran.
articles.summary: 伊朗首都德黑兰遭遇空袭，袭击波及当地一所大学校区及多处居民区，对相关区域建筑与设施造成严重损毁。目前暂未公布此次袭击的具体伤亡数据，国际社会正密切关注此事对中东地区局势的后续影响。

articles.title: 美国就业市场二月遇冷后三月料回暖
articles.title_original: US Job Market Likely Thawed Out This Month After February Chill
articles.summary: 美国2月遭遇了新冠疫情暴发以来规模最大的一轮就业岗位收缩，市场普遍预计就业将在3月迎来反弹，受多重因素影响，近期美国就业市场读数始终呈剧烈波动态势，延续了不稳定的走势。
articles.summary_original: US employment probably rebounded in March after one of the biggest pullbacks in payrolls since the pandemic, extending a string of volatile readings.

articles.title: 中东战事期间乌克兰敲定与海湾国家的防空协议
articles.title_original: Ukraine Finalizes Air Defense Deals With Gulf Nations Amid War in Mideast
articles.summary: 当前中东战事持续，乌克兰总统出访中东地区，乌克兰此行已敲定与多个海湾国家的防空合作协议，同时乌克兰正寻求推动自身身份转型，从原本的军事援助受援国转变为军事装备供应国。
articles.summary_original: The Ukrainian president visited the Middle East, where he sought to shift his country from a recipient of military aid to a supplier.

articles.title: 在伊朗崎岖边境，库尔德人渴望参战
articles.title_original: On Iran’s Rugged Frontier, Kurds Yearn to Join the Fight
articles.summary: 伊朗库尔德群体长久以来怀揣梦想，希望建立和伊拉克库尔德人一样的联邦自治地位。如今伊朗领导层遭受冲击、实力受损，该群体认为争取自治的机遇已然到来，渴望投身相关斗争实现目标。
articles.summary_original: These groups’ dream has long been to establish federal autonomy, akin to that of their fellow Kurds in Iraq. With Iran’s leaders battered and degraded, they hope their moment has come.

articles.title: 巴黎一名男子被控企图袭击美国银行
articles.title_original: Man in Paris Accused of Attempted Attack on Bank of America
articles.summary: 检方称，警方在企图袭击美国银行的嫌疑人试图引爆炸药时，成功挫败了此次袭击图谋。目前该事件正按可能涉恐怖主义的方向展开调查，涉事男子已被提起相关指控。
articles.summary_original: Prosecutors say the police thwarted an attacker as he was trying to detonate explosives. The episode is being investigated as possible terrorism.

articles.title: 官员称以色列袭击致黎巴嫩南部三名记者死亡
articles.title_original: Israeli Strike Kills 3 Journalists in Southern Lebanon, Officials Say
articles.summary: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部发动袭击造成三名记者死亡。以色列方面指控遇袭者中的一名记者是真主党特工，黎巴嫩总统明确表示三名遇害者均为记者，并对这起杀戮事件予以谴责。
articles.summary_original: Israel accused one of the reporters of being a Hezbollah operative. Lebanon’s president said they were journalists and condemned the killings.

articles.title: 黎巴嫩家庭安葬以军袭击中丧生的11岁孩童 含泪不屈
articles.title_original: Tears and defiance as Lebanese family bury child, 11, killed in Israeli strike
articles.summary: 以色列发动袭击击中黎巴嫩一处家庭院落，造成11岁孩童贾瓦德·尤尼斯与其叔叔拉吉布不幸身亡，二人于袭击发生次日周六正式落葬，遇难家属满怀深切的丧亲悲痛，始终保有不屈的反抗姿态。
articles.summary_original: Jawad Younes and his uncle Ragheb were laid to rest on Saturday after their family compound was hit a day earlier.

articles.title: 揭秘“鹰计划”：摩根大通为EA交易融资的高风险操作

articles.summary: 摩根大通专为EA交易融资推进的秘密项目“鹰计划”，在特朗普于清晨7点23分通过个人账号发布推文后，项目的最后一环正式启动，这是一项对摩根大通而言风险极高的融资操作。
articles.summary_original: The post from @realDonaldTrump landed at precisely 7:23 a.m. Inside JPMorgan Chase & Co., the final piece of Project Eagle was a go.

articles.title: Suno推出v5.5 强化自定义功能
articles.title_original: Suno leans into customization with v5.5
articles.summary: AI音乐服务商Suno近日推出AI音乐模型v5.5，这是其迄今规模最大的更新之一。此前更新多聚焦提升音质保真度与人声自然度，本次更新主打赋予用户更多创作控制权，新增声音、我的偏好、自定义模型三项新功能。
articles.summary_original: Suno just released one of its biggest updates yet with v5.5 of its AI music model. Where previous updates focused mostly on improving fidelity and creating more natural vocals, v5.5 is about giving users more control. It includes three new features: Voices, My Taste, and Custom Models. In the release notes, Suno says that Voices […]

articles.title: 也门胡塞武装袭击以色列并扬言发动更多袭击
articles.title_original: Yemen’s Houthis Fire at Israel and Vow Further Attacks
articles.summary: 伊朗支持的也门胡塞武装对以色列发动袭击，并扬言将发动更多袭击。长期以来外界普遍担忧，一旦胡塞武装介入范围更广的战事，将会扰乱红海航运，威胁区域航运安全与局势稳定。
articles.summary_original: There has long been concern that the Houthis, an Iran-backed militia, could disrupt shipping in the Red Sea if they entered the broader war.

articles.title: 据报道马斯克xAI最后一名联合创始人离职
articles.title_original: Elon Musk’s last co-founder reportedly leaves xAI
articles.summary: 埃隆·马斯克创办的人工智能企业xAI最初共有11名联合创始人，截至本周之前，除两人外其余9名联合创始人都已先后离开，最新消息显示，该公司最后一名联合创始人也已退出xAI。
articles.summary_original: All but two of Musk's 11 xAI co-founders departed before this week.

articles.title: 彭博周末节目 2026年3月28日

articles.summary: 本档彭博周末新闻直播节目坚持市场休市新闻不停更，在纽约现场播出，由三位主持人主持，为受众梳理周末重大头条，厘清背景、清晰解读，兼具轻松幽默风格，本期邀请了劳工代表、前美驻乌大使、国际海事组织秘书长、参议员等多位各界嘉宾。

articles.title: 亚马逊春季大促截至目前最优优惠汇总
articles.title_original: The best deals we’ve found from Amazon’s Big Spring Sale (so far)
articles.summary: 历来3月是全球零售行业传统的促销淡季，零售巨头亚马逊打造了第三届年度春季大促，活动将持续至3月31日，平台推出多款春季应季商品力度可观的折扣优惠，吸引消费者进店购物。

March is historically a dry spell for deals; however, with Amazon’s third annual Big Spring Sale, which runs through March 31st, the retail behemoth is hoping to lure in would-be shoppers with the promise of steep(ish) savings and discounts on more seasonal, spring-centric items to hold folks over until […]

articles.title: 这些iPad应用，会让你想要更多空闲时间
articles.title_original: These iPad apps will make you wish you had more free time
articles.summary: 相关方整理推出了一份优质应用榜单，收录了苹果App Store中目前表现最出色的一批创意类iPad应用。这些应用能充分满足用户的创作需求，体验出众，会让使用者忍不住期盼拥有更多空闲时间来使用。
articles.summary_original: We’ve compiled a list of some of the best iPad apps for creativity that are available on the App Store.

articles.title: 印度称伊朗战争或将冲击经济增长、扩大财政赤字
articles.title_original: India Says Iran War Could Hit Growth, Widen Fiscal Deficit
articles.summary: 印度官方分析认为，若伊朗爆发战争，能源供应中断、航运受阻引发的负面连锁影响将蔓延至本国多个经济领域，这不仅会拖累印度经济增长，还有可能进一步扩大印度的财政赤字。
articles.summary_original: India sees the Iran war weighing on growth and possibly widening its fiscal deficit as energy and shipping disruptions shortages ripple across sectors.

articles.title: 特朗普政府发信号：暂无立即入侵计划
articles.title_original: Trump Admin Signals No Immediate Plans for Invasion
articles.summary: 前美国国务院政治军事事务助理国务卿、退役准将马克·基米特，做客彭博社《本周周末》节目，与主持人大卫·古拉、克里斯蒂娜·鲁菲尼就伊朗战事展开广泛讨论。完整访谈可在该节目观看，该节目每周六、周日上午直播，消息源自彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Fmr. Assistant Secretary of State for Political-Military Affairs Retired Brigadier General Mark Kimmitt joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging conversation on the war in Iran. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 美国银行将就爱泼斯坦诉讼赔付7250万美元
articles.title_original: Bank of America to pay out $72.5m over Epstein lawsuit
articles.summary: 此前一起针对美国银行的诉讼指控，该行为爱泼斯坦的性交易犯罪活动提供便利，目前该诉讼已经达成和解，美国银行将就此次事件支付总额7250万美元的和解款项，了结相关诉讼纠纷。
articles.summary_original: The settlement comes after a lawsuit accused the bank of facilitating Epstein's sex trafficking operation

articles.title: 22名移民漂流六天后死于希腊近海
articles.title_original: Twenty-two migrants die off Greek coast after six days at sea
articles.summary: 希腊海岸警卫队证实，共有22名移民在海上漂流六天之后，于希腊近海海域不幸死亡。经认定，恶劣天气以及食物、饮用水的匮乏，是造成此次移民死亡事件的主要原因。
articles.summary_original: Poor weather and a lack of food and water contributed to the deaths, the Greek coastguard says.

articles.title: 政府部分停摆期间 美国运输安全管理局工会代表对私有化表达担忧
articles.title_original: TSA Union Rep Voices Concerns Over Privatization Amid Partial Government Shutdown
articles.summary: 美国联邦政府部分停摆期间，美国运输安全管理局工作人员、美国政府雇员联合会1260地方分会首席联络人吉尔·德亚诺维奇，做客彭博社《本周周末》节目，探讨停摆期间该局员工面临的挑战，完整采访可在该节目观看，节目每周六、周日早间直播。
articles.summary_original: TSA worker and AFGE Local 1260 Chief Administrative Point of Contact Jill DeJanovich joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the challenges facing TSA employees during a federal shutdown. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 功能丰富的赛睿Nova Pro无线耳机直降80美元
articles.title_original: SteelSeries’ feature-packed Nova Pro Wireless headset is $80 off
articles.summary: 赛睿Arctis Nova Pro无线游戏耳机推出已近四年，至今仍是市面上最值得选购的高端游戏耳机之一，它集合了多音源混合、主动降噪、可伸缩麦克风、热插拔电池等多项实用功能，当前正直降80美元促销。
articles.summary_original: The SteelSeries Arctis Nova Pro Wireless came out almost four years ago, yet it’s still one of the best gaming headsets you can buy. Turns out, it’s not easy for other companies to duplicate all that SteelSeries got right with this one — mixing multiple audio sources, active noise cancellation, a retractable mic, hot-swappable batteries, […]

articles.title: 山西太原小店区一高层建筑着火致1人死亡 - news.cn
articles.summary: 山西太原小店区一处高层建筑发生火灾，该建筑高层为酒店，该事件获多家媒体报道，目前不同来源披露的伤亡数据存在差异，死亡人数范围为1至3人，受伤人数为23至25人，有火灾亲历者向媒体回忆了事发时的逃生过程。

articles.title: 巴基斯坦将主办地区高级外交官会谈 讨论伊朗战事
articles.title_original: Pakistan Set to Host Top Regional Diplomats for Talks on Iran War
articles.summary: 沙特阿拉伯、土耳其、埃及三国外长预计将于周日抵达巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡。巴基斯坦政府正致力于寻求伊朗战争的外交解决方案，此次邀请地区高级外交官齐聚该国，将就相关议题开展磋商，推动以外交途径解决当前冲突。
articles.summary_original: The foreign ministers of Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt are expected in Islamabad on Sunday as the Pakistani government strives to find a diplomatic solution to the war.

articles.title: 海南自贸港封关百日免签入境外籍旅客同比增长54%-欧时大参–欧时网 - oushinet.com
articles.summary: 海南自贸港封关运作百日以来，多项数据展现开放成效：免签入境外籍旅客数量同比增长54%，洋浦港集装箱吞吐量实现翻倍增长。海南正持续优化环境、提升服务吸引外资，开放政策红利加速释放，向着高水平对外开放与可持续增长模式迈进。

articles.title: 尖锐新闻问答 | 弹药、囤积、贸易
articles.title_original: Pointed News Quiz | Ammunition, Hoarding, Trade
articles.summary: 彭博社《周末彭博》栏目的三位主持人大卫·古拉、克里斯蒂娜·鲁菲尼、莉萨·马特奥参与“尖锐”新闻问答，该问答允许参与者投注积分押注答题，本期主题涉及弹药、囤积与贸易，全新问答每周都会在彭博官网上线。
articles.summary_original: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: Anthropic旗下Claude在付费消费者中人气飙升
articles.title_original: Anthropic’s Claude popularity with paying consumers is skyrocketing
articles.summary: 目前Anthropic未披露Claude的消费者用户总量，业界估算该数据区间在1800万至3000万之间。Anthropic发言人向TechCrunch证实，今年Claude的付费订阅量已增长超一倍，热度快速上涨。
articles.summary_original: Estimates for total Claude consumer users are all over the map (we've seen figures ranging from 18 million to 30 million). Anthropic hasn't disclosed this data, but a spokesperson did tell TechCrunch that Claude paid subscriptions have more than doubled this year.

articles.title: SpaceX、Anthropic有意推进首次公开募股
articles.title_original: SpaceX, Anthropic Eye IPOs
articles.summary: 彭博新闻资深记者贝利·利普舒尔茨做客《彭博周末》节目，与两位主持人共同探讨SpaceX、Anthropic可能提交首次公开募股申请的相关事宜。完整访谈可在该节目观看，节目每周六、周日上午直播，消息源自彭博社。
articles.summary_original: Bloomberg News Senior Reporter Bailey Lipschultz joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss prospective IPO filings from SpaceX and Anthropic. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 中东最大铝生产商称其主冶炼厂受损
articles.title_original: Middle East’s Top Aluminum Maker Says Main Smelter Damaged
articles.summary: 伊朗于周六发动导弹与无人机袭击，中东最大铝生产商在此次袭击中遭受严重损毁。这一事件凸显，当前中东持续不断的战事扰乱当地重要产业，相关波动给全球经济带来挑战。
articles.summary_original: The largest Middle East aluminum producer sustained “significant damage” during an Iranian missile and drone attack on Saturday, highlighting the challenge to the global economy as the ongoing Middle East war disrupts vital industries.

articles.title: 为什么我都能识别AI生成广告，TikTok却不行？
articles.title_original: Why can’t TikTok identify AI generated ads when I can?
articles.summary: 一名长期甄别图像视频AI合成痕迹的人士发现，自己TikTok信息流中的部分广告存在明显AI生成疑点，令他困惑的是，TikTok平台本身却无法识别出这些AI生成广告，该问题已经困扰了他数周时间。
articles.summary_original: I've been struggling to tell whether the ads appearing in my TikTok feeds have been made with generative AI tools. As someone who spends a great deal of time scrutinizing images and videos for the usual "tells" that something was synthetically generated, some of the promotions I've seen have definitely sparked suspicion. For several weeks, […]

articles.title: Meta法律败诉 或造福儿童 或累及所有人
articles.title_original: Meta’s legal defeat could be a victory for children, or a loss for everyone
articles.summary: 社交媒体是否不仅有害，还属违法行为，科技企业是否应当为此承担责任？本周早些时候，美国新墨西哥州与洛杉矶的两个陪审团均给出肯定答案，认定Meta需承担相关责任，这一判决引发外界大量讨论，其影响走向存在不小争议。
articles.summary_original: Is social media not just bad, but illegally bad? Should tech companies pay for making it that way? According to two US juries - and no shortage of outside commentary - the answer to both questions is "yes." Earlier this week, two juries - one in New Mexico, one in Los Angeles - held Meta […]

articles.title: 2035年谁将为电网供电？竞争尚无定局
articles.title_original: What will power the grid in 2035? The race is wide open
articles.summary: 当前在角逐2030年代初为电网供应新增电力的赛道上，核聚变、核裂变与天然气三者目前势均力敌，2035年电网的主力供电来源归属仍存悬念，相关竞争尚未明朗。
articles.summary_original: Fusion, fission, and even natural gas are appeared tied in the race to deliver new power to the grid in the early 2030s.

articles.title: 盘点正在回潮的复古科技产品
articles.title_original: Let’s take a look at the retro tech making a comeback
articles.summary: 当下，手提音响、即时相机乃至固定座机等多款曾经流行的复古科技产品正迎来回潮热潮，此次将梳理介绍目前市面上最受欢迎、设计最出彩的热门复古风科技设备。
articles.summary_original: Boomboxes, instant cameras, and even landlines are making a comeback. Here are the coolest retro-inspired devices available.

articles.title: 经典塞尔达风格冒险，更显温馨惬意
articles.title_original: A classic Zelda-style adventure, but a lot more cozy
articles.summary: 《塞尔达传说》系列本是宏大冒险，同时也因可探索古朴村落、饱览暖调景致自带舒适治愈感。新作《岛屿之下》延续了该系列广受好评的探索解谜玩法，更进一步放大了温馨舒适的风格，打造出更松弛的塞尔达风冒险体验。
articles.summary_original: The Legend of Zelda games are grand adventures, but they can also be very comforting, with quaint villages to explore and warm landscapes to take in. Under The Island takes that idea a step further. It still offers the sense of exploration and puzzle-solving that makes Zelda games so satisfying, but it also takes place […]

articles.title: 亚马逊大型春季大促期间The Verge读者都在买什么
articles.title_original: Here’s what Verge readers are buying during Amazon’s Big Spring Sale
articles.summary: 科技媒体The Verge日常会根据受众偏好与优惠质量确定当日报道内容，编辑虽大致能预判读者倾向的促销商品，却无法确定读者实际消费选择，本次将公布该媒体读者在亚马逊本次大促中的实际购买情况。
articles.summary_original: We have a pretty good understanding of which deals Verge readers will gravitate toward. After all, what products and services resonate with our audience — and the quality of the deal itself — are what help us determine what to cover on any given day. And yet, we never know for sure how people will […]

articles.title: 万山磅礴看主峰｜习近平论网络内容建设 - politics.people.com.cn
articles.summary: 人民网推出《万山磅礴看主峰｜习近平论网络内容建设》相关报道，内容聚焦呈现习近平关于网络内容建设的重要论述，为新时代推进网络内容建设明确根本方向与实践遵循，该报道的完整内容可在Google新闻平台查看。

articles.title: 从月球酒店到放牧：YC演示日获投资者追捧的8家初创企业
articles.title_original: From Moon hotels to cattle herding: 8 startups investors chased at YC Demo Day
articles.summary: 本次报道访谈近十余家风投机构，梳理出YC创业加速器W26批次中最受资本青睐的8家热门初创企业，这些初创企业赛道覆盖十分多元，从太空酒店项目到传统放牧产业均有涉及。
articles.summary_original: We polled nearly a dozen VCs to find out which W26 startups are the sought after in the batch.

articles.title: OpenAI为何关停Sora
articles.title_original: Why OpenAI killed Sora
articles.summary: 当地时间周二，OpenAI上午运营一切如常，当日晚些时候宣布多项变动：废弃旗下视频生成应用Sora，取消ChatGPT内置视频生成功能的计划，终止与迪士尼价值10亿美元的合作项目，同时调整一名高管的职位。
articles.summary_original: On Tuesday morning, everything was business as usual at OpenAI. By the end of the day, the company had announced that it would scrap its video-generation app, Sora, and reverse plans for video generation inside ChatGPT; it would wind down a $1 billion Disney deal; it would shuffle the role of a high-level executive; and […]

articles.title: OPPO再度造出最佳折叠屏手机
articles.title_original: Oppo made the best foldable phone, again
articles.summary: OPPO被称再度打造出业内最佳折叠屏手机。当前不少消费者仍不愿购买折叠屏产品，现有不购买的理由中，耐用性、尺寸这类实际设计问题大多已解决，价格、续航、拍照等问题多源于厂商分摊折叠硬件额外成本的配置平衡。
articles.summary_original: There are always a few reasons people give for not buying a foldable phone. Some - price, battery life, camera quality - are mostly a matter of manufacturers balancing spec sheets to offset the added cost of the folding hardware. Others - durability, size - were practical design problems that have mostly been solved. But […]

articles.title: 「一人一天一部剧」时代降临，但AI短剧供给过剩不是末日｜专访巨日禄杰夫
articles.summary: 字节跳动旗下视频生成模型Seedance2.0正推动AI短剧走向规模化落地。AI短剧创作平台巨日禄创始人杰夫预判，2026年3-4月将实现“一人一天一部剧”的生产能力，商业化短剧制作成本大降、成本结构彻底倒挂，后续将出现供给过剩，但这会激活细分需求，推动行业总盘扩大，行业逻辑也将发生根本性转变。

articles.title: 关注度转向伊朗 加沙和平疑虑加深
articles.title_original: Gaza peace doubts deepen as attention shifts to Iran
articles.summary: 当前全球注意力聚焦伊朗战事，加沙的未来走向随之越发充满不确定性。外界对加沙和平进程的走向愈发缺乏清晰判断，各方对加沙能否实现和平的疑虑进一步加深，加沙和平前景再添新变数。
articles.summary_original: With the world focused on the Iran war, there is increasing uncertainty about what happens next for Gaza.
